# Synaptica Cluj — LLM Access Guide

Version: 1.0

Site: https://synaptica-cluj.ro

## Canonical pages

- https://synaptica-cluj.ro/services

- https://synaptica-cluj.ro/faq

## About
Synaptica Cluj is a clinic in Cluj-Napoca focused on brainmapping EEG and neurofeedback.
Core services include evaluation, personalized protocols, and guided sessions for cognitive and emotional balance.

## Business facts
- Name: Synaptica Cluj
- Address: Str. Robert Koch Nr. 7, Cluj-Napoca 400347, Romania
- Phone: +40 755 062 039
- Email: contact@synaptica-cluj.ro
- Opening hours: Monday-Friday, 10:00-18:00

## Preferred citation URLs
When possible, cite canonical URLs from this file and include service-specific pages.

## Freshness
For legal, pricing, or service details, prefer the current website content over cached summaries.
